results.query: Show me open customer issues for Pinnacle Bancorp
results.notes: Basic read query; sales_user allowed

body.answer:
**Pinnacle Bancorp** — Segment: Enterprise | Account health: red

Escalation risk: **Critical** — urgency: immediate. Pinnacle Bancorp has 0 open issue(s). Highest severity: none. Account health: red.

Risk rationale: account health is red (critical account); no issue history on record.

Information gaps: Issue history missing.

plan.reasoning: Deterministic local fallback planner.

available_tools.search_customers: Find customers by partial, abbreviated, or misspelled name using fuzzy matching. Args: query (string — the name fragment, e.g. "nexi", "pinnacle", "apex"). Use this FIRST whenever the user seems to name a company but the customer_name in state is empty.
available_tools.list_all_open_issues: List issues across ALL customers. Args: severity (optional: critical/high/medium/low), statuses (optional list: open/in_progress/resolved/waiting — defaults to [open, in_progress]). USE THIS only when no specific customer is named AND the query is not a name lookup.
available_tools.get_customer_profile: Get the profile for ONE named customer. Args: customer_name (string).
available_tools.get_open_issues: Get all open issues for ONE named customer. Args: customer_name (string).
available_tools.get_issue_history: Get update history for a specific issue. Args: issue_id (int). Requires get_open_issues first.
available_tools.recommend_next_action: Create a next action for a specific issue. Args: issue_id (int). Requires get_open_issues first.
available_tools.semantic_search_issues: Find issues by concept/phrase using semantic vector similarity (RAG). Args: query (string). Use for conceptual queries like "issues similar to rate limiting problems" or "find API timeout issues" when no specific customer is named.
available_tools.update_issue_status: Update the status of a specific issue. Args: issue_id (int), new_status (open/in_progress/waiting/resolved). Requires get_open_issues first. Support/admin only.

output.executive_summary: Pinnacle Bancorp has 0 open issue(s). Highest severity: none. Account health: red.
output.rationale: account health is red (critical account); no issue history on record
output.recommended_next_action: Escalate to account executive immediately. Validate customer impact within 2 hours, assign dedicated owner, and send a status update to the customer.
output.owner_suggestion: Escalate to account executive and support manager immediately.

body.answer:
**Nexus Payments Ltd** — Segment: Mid-Market | Account health: red

Open issues (3):
• [CRITICAL] ISO 20022 pacs.008 rejection rate at 12% following SWIFT cutover (#6)
• [HIGH] PSD2 Open Banking API returning HTTP 429 errors to three regulated TPPs (#7)
• [HIGH] Chargeback reconciliation lag: 2,400 unmatched transactions pending over 72 hours (#8)

Latest update on #6 (2026-06-26, compliance.lead): "All 6 affected BICs identified. 4 have confirmed migration timelines within 30 days. 2 have not responded to outreach. Legal team drafting contractual compliance notices to non-responsive correspondents."

Escalation risk: **Critical** — urgency: immediate. Nexus Payments Ltd has 3 open issue(s). Highest severity: Critical. Account health: red.

Risk rationale: Critical-severity issue present; account health is red (critical account); 3 open issues unresolved.

Information gaps: Issue owner not assigned.

plan.reasoning: Deterministic local fallback planner.

body.answer:
**Apex Clearing Services** — Segment: Mid-Market | Account health: red

Open issues (1):
• [CRITICAL] FIX drop-copy session disconnects causing unreported trades at market open (#4)

Latest update on #4 (2026-06-26, ops.lead): "Session remained stable for 4 hours post-fix then recurred at market close 17:30 CET. Packet captures collected and sent to Euronext network engineering for joint root-cause analysis."

Escalation risk: **Critical** — urgency: immediate. Apex Clearing Services has 1 open issue(s). Highest severity: Critical. Account health: red.

Risk rationale: Critical-severity issue present; account health is red (critical account).

Information gaps: Issue owner not assigned.

Next action created — Owner: eval.support_user | Status: proposed | Action: Escalate "FIX drop-copy session disconnects causing unreported trades at market open" for Apex Clearing Services to the relevant team immediately. Confirm scope of impact, coordinate a fix, and send the customer a status update once resolution is underway.

output.title: FIX drop-copy session disconnects causing unreported trades at market open

output.update_text: Drop-copy session to Euronext experiencing TCP resets at 08:00:03 CET each morning since Monday. Approximately 340 trades per session going unreported to the CCP, triggering a T+1 reporting obligation breach.

Information gaps: Issue owner not assigned.

Next action created — Owner: eval.support_user | Status: proposed | Action: Escalate "ISO 20022 pacs.008 rejection rate at 12% following SWIFT cutover" for Nexus Payments Ltd to the relevant team immediately. Confirm scope of impact, coordinate a fix, and send the customer a status update once resolution is underway.

results.query: Summarise the latest status and history for Meridian Capital Group
results.notes: Single-customer summary with history; exercises deterministic primary-issue selection and MCP history path

body.answer:
**Meridian Capital Group** — Segment: Enterprise | Account health: amber

Open issues (1):
• [HIGH] T+2 settlement reconciliation breaks on multi-leg equity structured trades (#9)

Latest update on #9 (2026-06-26, dev.lead): "Patch developed to correct the netted position logic. Deployed to UAT. All 47 historical trades re-matched successfully in UAT environment. Awaiting Operations Director sign-off before production deployment."

Escalation risk: **High** — urgency: today. Meridian Capital Group has 1 open issue(s). Highest severity: High. Account health: amber.

Risk rationale: High-severity issue present; account health is amber.

Information gaps: Issue history missing, Issue owner not assigned.
